news.title:
JPMorgan upgrades TVS Motor to Overweight, raises target price to ₹4,440 from ₹3,860.
Cites easing disruption risks, strong positioning despite inflation, and EPS cuts for FY27.
news.summary:
JPMorgan upgrades TVS Motor to Overweight, raises target price to ₹4,440 from ₹3,860.
Cites easing disruption risks, strong positioning despite inflation, and EPS cuts for FY27.

news.title:
Motilal Oswal lists Maruti Suzuki, TVS Motor, M&M as top picks amid Q4 challenges.
Auto sector faces input cost, crude price risks; ancillaries like Motherson, Endurance also favored.
news.summary:
Motilal Oswal lists Maruti Suzuki, TVS Motor, M&M as top picks amid Q4 challenges.
Auto sector faces input cost, crude price risks; ancillaries like Motherson, Endurance also favored.

news.title:
MOFSL sees FY27 as favorable for Indian equities post FY26 underperformance caused by FII outflows and geopolitical risks.
Top stock picks include Bharti Airtel, SBI, ICICI Bank, M&M, Titan, Infosys, and TVS Motors; mid-caps outperform large-caps.
news.summary:
MOFSL sees FY27 as favorable for Indian equities post FY26 underperformance caused by FII outflows and geopolitical risks.
Top stock picks include Bharti Airtel, SBI, ICICI Bank, M&M, Titan, Infosys, and TVS Motors; mid-caps outperform large-caps.

news.title:
E2W makers face margin pressure with aluminium prices up 10-12% YoY, driven by global supply shocks.
TVS Motor, Ather Energy, and Bajaj Auto use selective price hikes to offset rising input costs and protect margins.
news.summary:
E2W makers face margin pressure with aluminium prices up 10-12% YoY, driven by global supply shocks.
TVS Motor, Ather Energy, and Bajaj Auto use selective price hikes to offset rising input costs and protect margins.

news.title:
TVS Motor gains as brokerages highlight EV growth boosting profitability.
Premium launches and product mix focus expected to aid earnings growth.
news.summary:
TVS Motor gains as brokerages highlight EV growth boosting profitability.
Premium launches and product mix focus expected to aid earnings growth.

news.title:
Goldman Sachs upgrades TVS Motor to 'Buy' with a 21% upside, citing strong volume growth and premium launches.
The brokerage forecasts margin improvements, driven by PLI incentives, and highlights risks like commodity inflation and competition.
news.summary:
Goldman Sachs upgrades TVS Motor to 'Buy' with a 21% upside, citing strong volume growth and premium launches.
The brokerage forecasts margin improvements, driven by PLI incentives, and highlights risks like commodity inflation and competition.

news.title:
Brokerages issued fresh ratings: Buy on TVS Motor, Marico, Adani Ports, Sobha; Underweight on Dabur.
Key drivers: Dabur's Q4 EBITDA growth, Marico's food segment strength, and TVS Motor's pricing power.
news.summary:
Brokerages issued fresh ratings: Buy on TVS Motor, Marico, Adani Ports, Sobha; Underweight on Dabur.
Key drivers: Dabur's Q4 EBITDA growth, Marico's food segment strength, and TVS Motor's pricing power.

news.title:
Motilal Oswal highlights top investment themes amid market volatility, citing geopolitical and economic challenges like the Iran-Israel conflict and rupee depreciation.
Top stock picks include SBI, ICICI Bank, BEL, IndiGo, Titan, TVS Motor, Groww, and Dixon Tech; Nifty 50 offers value at a 15% P/E discount.
news.summary:
Motilal Oswal highlights top investment themes amid market volatility, citing geopolitical and economic challenges like the Iran-Israel conflict and rupee depreciation.
Top stock picks include SBI, ICICI Bank, BEL, IndiGo, Titan, TVS Motor, Groww, and Dixon Tech; Nifty 50 offers value at a 15% P/E discount.

news.title: TVS Motor's Q4 sales volumes surged 28%, per corporate announcement.
news.summary: TVS Motor's Q4 sales volumes surged 28%, per corporate announcement.

news.title:
TVS Motor reports record sales in FY 2025-26 at 5.9M units, a 24% growth YoY.
March 2026 sales rose 25% YoY; EVs grew 44%, 3-wheelers 46%, and exports 33%.
news.summary:
TVS Motor reports record sales in FY 2025-26 at 5.9M units, a 24% growth YoY.
March 2026 sales rose 25% YoY; EVs grew 44%, 3-wheelers 46%, and exports 33%.

news.title:
Auto stocks surged as Nifty Auto index rose 3.7%, outperforming Nifty 50's 2.6% gain.
Jefferies forecasts double-digit YoY growth for OEMs like Ashok Leyland, Tata Motors, and TVS Motor.
news.summary:
Auto stocks surged as Nifty Auto index rose 3.7%, outperforming Nifty 50's 2.6% gain.
Jefferies forecasts double-digit YoY growth for OEMs like Ashok Leyland, Tata Motors, and TVS Motor.

news.title:
TVS Motor invests ₹2B in Ultraviolet Automotive to expand output.
The investment includes setting up a new EV plant in Karnataka.
news.summary:
TVS Motor invests ₹2B in Ultraviolet Automotive to expand output.

news.title:
TVS Motor, CRISIL, IREDA, and others to trade ex-dividend next week; TVS Holdings offers highest dividend at ₹86/share.
IRB Infra, Triton Valves announce bonus issues; R B Denims plans bonus and stock split; Gujarat Cotex launches rights issue.
news.summary:
TVS Motor, CRISIL, IREDA, and others to trade ex-dividend next week; TVS Holdings offers highest dividend at ₹86/share.
IRB Infra, Triton Valves announce bonus issues; R B Denims plans bonus and stock split; Gujarat Cotex launches rights issue.

news.title:
TVS Holdings declares Rs 86 interim dividend per share, totaling Rs 174 cr payout.
Dividend applies to 2.02 cr shares with Rs 5 face value for FY26.
news.summary:
TVS Holdings declares Rs 86 interim dividend per share, totaling Rs 174 cr payout.
Dividend applies to 2.02 cr shares with Rs 5 face value for FY26.

news.title:
Tata Steel invests ₹1,680.3 cr in T Steel Holdings; TVS Motor approves ₹12/share interim dividend.
HDFC Life faces ₹126.5 cr tax demand; NTPC Green signs MoU with Nxtra; Waaree plans ₹3,900 cr expansion.
news.summary:
Tata Steel invests ₹1,680.3 cr in T Steel Holdings; TVS Motor approves ₹12/share interim dividend.
HDFC Life faces ₹126.5 cr tax demand; NTPC Green signs MoU with Nxtra; Waaree plans ₹3,900 cr expansion.

Preferred picks include M&M, Bajaj Auto, TVS, Ashok Leyland due to stronger execution amid earnings risks.
